title: pseudohandelia umbellifera
intro: Pseudohandelia umbellifera, also known as the umbrella tree, is a species of plant native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseudohandelia umbellifera include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from headaches and nausea. Herbal preparations of Pseudohandelia umbellifera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
